seed_rate.notes: Planting density of 250-400 plants per hectare depending on dwarfing rootstock.

sowing.soil_conditions: Well-drained, deep loamy soils with pH 6.0-6.5 in cool temperate climates.

irrigation.notes: Maintain moderate soil moisture around roots. Avoid waterlogging.
Critical moisture phase. Water stress causes flower drop and reduced fruit set.
Regular watering ensures uniform fruit sizing and prevents fruit cracking.

fertilizer.method: Ring placement around the tree basin
fertilizer.notes: Apply well-decomposed Farmyard Manure (FYM) along with NPK.

fertilizer.method: Soil surface broadcasting in tree basins
fertilizer.notes: Boosts vegetative growth and supports early fruit set development.

maturity_indicators: Change of ground color from green to yellow or red
Ease of fruit separation from the spur (pedicel snaps off easily)
harvest.harvest_method: Manual hand plucking with stalks intact
harvest.notes: Store harvested apples in cool storage at 0-2°C with high relative humidity.
